$comment: Project-scoped Convey hook. Merges with (does NOT replace) any user-level ~/.claude/settings.json hooks. SessionEnd -> the Convey distiller: when a Convey conversation in this repo ends, it regenerates features/CONVEY-SESSIONS.generated.md and writes a per-session stub at features/sessions/<id>.md. Defensive (always exits 0), metadata-only, no git. See features/convey-session-distiller.feature.
